testimonials.title: Sellers love it
testimonials.subtitle: Here's what early adopters are saying
testimonials.quote1: I spent 2 hours a day replying to DMs and chasing bank slips. Now customers just buy directly. Total game changer.
testimonials.quote2: Set up my store in 2 minutes. Sales jumped 40% in the first month because people could finally pay online.
testimonials.quote3: FriMi, eZcash, cards — my customers love having payment options. The PayHere integration just works.
testimonials.quote4: Was paying LKR 2,500/month on another platform. Tap2Buy is free and honestly way easier to use.
faq.title: Questions? Answered.
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
faq.a1: Yes. LKR 0/month on the Free plan. We take a small 6% only when you make a sale. No sale = no charge.
faq.a2: It's added on top of your price. If your product is LKR 1,000, the customer pays LKR 1,060. You get the full LKR 1,000.
faq.a3: Online: Visa, Mastercard, FriMi, eZcash, and bank transfers via PayHere. Plus Cash on Delivery for buyers who prefer to pay in person.
faq.q4: When do I get my money?
faq.a4: PayHere settles to your bank account within 1-2 business days.
faq.q5: Do I need a business registration?
faq.a5: Nope. Just sign up and start selling. No BR needed for Free and Pro plans.
faq.q6: Can I use my own domain?
faq.a6: Yes — on Pro and Business plans. Free plan stores get a Tap2Buy link.
faq.a7: All payments go through PayHere's PCI-DSS certified system. We never see or store card details.
faq.q8: How does Cash on Delivery work?
faq.a8: Buyers pay a small booking fee online to confirm the order, then pay the rest in cash on delivery. You get an 8% COD fee (6% on Pro, 4% on Business). COD unlocks after your first 10 online orders.
faq.a9: Tap 'Create your store', add products, share your link. Done in under 60 seconds.
